steps.title: Read the frequency for color Y from the table
steps.content: From the frequency table, color Y appears in exactly 3 gemstones out of the total 157 gemstones.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
Probability of selecting color Y equals the number of favorable outcomes divided by the total number of outcomes:
$$P(\text{color Y}) = \frac{\text{number of color Y gemstones}}{\text{total gemstones}} = \frac{3}{157}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
